Introduction to Microeconomics Udayan Roy 2021-06-02 Preface I hope to publish here my lecture notes for a course called Introduction to Microeconomics that I have taught for three decades. The required textbook for the course is Principles of Microeconomics by N. Gregory Mankiw. Although Mankiws is an excellent book, I have constantly felt the need to make many small changes. Until now, I have been making these changes in my PowerPoint slides. But the availability of new technology  especially R, R Studio, the bookdown package in R, and Github  has made it easy for me to gather my slides and turn them into a free online version that reads like a textbook. Also, reading slides usually makes for a choppy experience. A fleshed out set of lecture notes may be more helpful to students.
